name: adb
description: Manipulates Android devices via ADB with emphasis on Wear OS. Provides scripts for screenshots, screen recording, tile management, WearableService inspection, package operations, and device configuration. Use when working with adb, Android devices, Wear OS watches, tiles, wearable data layer, dumpsys, or device debugging. Triggers: adb, android device, wear os, wearable, tile, screenshot, screen recording, dumpsys, logcat.
